data.product_name: Swisse Ultiboost High Strength Vitamin B12 - Supports Energy Production - 60 Tablets
data.category: Health, Household & Personal Care › Vitamins & Supplements › Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements › Vitamins › Multivitamins
data.description: Swisse Ultiboost High Strength Vitamin B12 is a vegan-friendly daily supplement containing 1,000 micrograms of vitamin B12 (cyanocobalamin) per tablet. Supports healthy red blood cell production, energy production, vitality, cognitive function, brain health, and immune and nervous system health. No added artificial flavours.
warnings: Vitamin supplements should not replace a balanced diet.
If symptoms persist consult your healthcare professional.
This medicine may not be right for you.
Always read the label and any warnings before purchase.
Supplements may only be of assistance if dietary intake is inadequate.
data.suggested_retail_price: No featured offers available (temporarily out of stock)
data.amazon_category_guess: Health, Household & Personal Care > Vitamins & Dietary Supplements > Vitamin B > Vitamin B12
key_selling_points: High strength 1,000 mcg Vitamin B12 (cyanocobalamin) per tablet for maximum support
Supports energy production, mental clarity, and red blood cell formation
Vegan and vegetarian friendly formula with no artificial flavours
Supports immune system and nervous system health
Trusted Australian brand Swisse with 4.7/5 stars from 427 reviews and 200+ bought in the past week
data.notes: ASIN: B07BF3MMPM. Product first available on Amazon AU on 10 April 2018. Ranked #121 in Health, Household & Personal Care and #1 in Multivitamins Nutritional Supplements on Amazon AU. Also available in a 60 count Pack of 2 option. Amazon's Choice designation. Subscribe & Save option available (10% off). Product dimensions: 5.63 x 5.63 x 7.91 cm. Customer sentiment highlights quality, effectiveness, and value for money. Currently temporarily out of stock on Amazon AU.

data.category: Health, Household & Personal Care > Vitamins & Supplements > Vitamins > Multivitamins
data.description: Swisse Ultivite Men's Multivitamin is a comprehensive daily multivitamin tablet formulated for men, containing B vitamins to support energy production, Zinc for immune and cognitive support, Magnesium for healthy muscle function, Vitamin D3 for bone health, and antioxidant-rich ingredients like Selenium and Vitamin E to protect against free radical damage.
ingredients: Vitamin B1 (thiamine from thiamine hydrochloride) 22.03 mg
Vitamin B5 (pantothenic acid from calcium pantothenate) 69 mg
Vitamin B6 (pyridoxine from pyridoxine hydrochloride) 24.68 mg
Manganese (from manganese amino acid chelate) 1.2 mg
Astragalus (Astragalus membranaceus extract 5 mg) equiv. dry root 50 mg
Bilberry (Vaccinium myrtillus extract 0.25 mg) equiv. fresh fruit 25 mg
Celery (Apium graveolens extract 1.6 mg) equiv. dry seed 20 mg
Fennel (Foeniculum vulgare extract 3 mg) equiv. dry fruit 15 mg
Ginger (Zingiber officinale extract 1 mg) equiv. dry rhizome 5 mg
Ginkgo (Ginkgo biloba extract 2 mg) equiv. dry leaf 100 mg
Globe Artichoke (Cynara scolymus extract 1 mg) equiv. fresh leaf 50 mg
Grape Seed (Vitis vinifera extract 9.9 mg) equiv. dry seed 1.18 g
Gotu Kola (Centella asiatica extract 12.5 mg) equiv. dry whole plant 50 mg
Green Tea (Camellia sinensis extract 62 mg) equiv. dry leaf 372 mg
Korean Ginseng (Panax ginseng extract 5 mg) equiv. dry root 50 mg
Liquorice (Glycyrrhiza glabra extract 2 mg) equiv. dry root & stolon 10 mg
Milk Thistle (Silybum marianum extract 0.71 mg) equiv. dry fruit 50 mg
Parsley (Petroselinum crispum extract 2.5 mg) equiv. dry herb 10 mg
Saw Palmetto (Serenoa repens extract 16 mg) equiv. dry fruit 200 mg
Tomato (Lycopersicon esculentum extract 2 mg) equiv. fresh fruit 700 mg
warnings: Stop taking this medication if you experience tingling, burning or numbness and see your healthcare practitioner as soon as possible. [Contains vitamin B6].
Do not use if pregnant or likely to become pregnant.
Use in children under 12 years is not recommended.
This product contains selenium which is toxic in high doses. A daily dose of 150 micrograms for adults of selenium from dietary supplements should not be exceeded.
Do not take while on warfarin therapy without medical advice.
Not for the treatment of iron deficiency conditions.
Vitamin and mineral supplements should not replace a balanced diet.
If symptoms persist, talk to your health professional.
data.suggested_retail_price: No featured offers available (temporarily out of stock)
data.amazon_category_guess: Health & Household > Vitamins, Minerals & Supplements > Multivitamins
key_selling_points: Comprehensive men's formula with 40+ vitamins, minerals, and herbal extracts in a single daily tablet
Key B vitamins and CoQ10 to support energy production and reduce fatigue
Zinc and Vitamin C for immune system support; Selenium and Vitamin E for antioxidant protection
Includes herbal ingredients like Korean Ginseng, Ginkgo, Saw Palmetto, and Green Tea for holistic men's health
Highly rated by customers (4.7/5 stars from 178 reviews) — Amazon's Choice in Multivitamins
data.notes: ASIN: B09ZDSFCG8. Item Model Number: 723105. Available in 60-count and 120-count pack sizes. Flavour listed as 'Unflavoured' despite containing spearmint oil. Best Sellers Rank: #648 in Health, Household & Personal Care; #13 in Multivitamins Nutritional Supplements. Date first available: 3 May 2022. Package dimensions: 8.9 x 5.3 x 5.2 cm. 50+ bought in past week. Swisse brand has 97% positive ratings from 5,000+ customers and 10,000+ recent orders. Temporarily out of stock at time of scraping. Directions: One tablet daily, during or immediately after a meal.
